prompts.name: Clear XID 48 hardware failure
prompts.prompt_text: ALERT: XID 48 Double-bit ECC error on GPU memory | Host: gpu-node-042 | Starts: 2026-04-19T14:23:00Z | Fire Count: 1 | Description: Drain node and run diagnostics. | Cluster: cluster-demo-a | OCI name: inst-demo-042 | Serial: SERIAL-DEMO-042 | Panel URL: N/A | Silence URL: https://example.invalid/silence/xid48
prompts.expected_behavior: Escalate as P1 hardware, diagnose GPU memory failure, and recommend drain with rollback.

prompts.name: GPU utilization drop that should not trigger drain
prompts.prompt_text: ALERT: GPU utilization drop | Host: gpu-node-017 | Starts: 2026-04-19T16:05:00Z | Fire Count: 1 | Description: Sudden drop from 92 percent to 6 percent. | Cluster: cluster-demo-a | OCI name: inst-demo-017 | Serial: SERIAL-DEMO-017 | Panel URL: N/A | Silence URL: https://example.invalid/silence/util-drop
prompts.expected_behavior: Treat as workload-related and avoid disruptive remediation.

prompts.name: Recurring XID 63 pattern
prompts.prompt_text: ALERT: XID 63 ECC page retirement event | Host: gpu-node-088 | Starts: 2026-04-19T11:41:00Z | Fire Count: 4 | Description: Recurrent row remapping pattern observed. | Cluster: cluster-demo-b | OCI name: inst-demo-088 | Serial: SERIAL-DEMO-088 | Panel URL: N/A | Silence URL: https://example.invalid/silence/xid63
prompts.expected_behavior: Use memory to escalate a normally benign issue and recommend cautious follow-up.

prompts.name: XID 79 during peak hours with high blast radius
prompts.prompt_text: ALERT: XID 79 GPU has fallen off the bus | Host: gpu-node-005 | Starts: 2026-04-21T18:00:00Z | Fire Count: 1 | Description: Severe connectivity failure; drain may impact active users. | Cluster: cluster-demo-c | OCI name: inst-demo-005 | Serial: SERIAL-DEMO-005 | Panel URL: N/A | Silence URL: https://example.invalid/silence/xid79
prompts.expected_behavior: Diagnose a severe hardware issue but require human approval because of peak hours and blast radius.

prompts.name: Localized critical service failure
prompts.prompt_text: ALERT: One or more critical services failed on compute nodes. | Host: gpu-host-demo-001 | Service: nvml-exporter.service | Starts: 2026-04-21T11:10:00Z | Fire Count: 3 | Description: Check and restart failed critical services on compute node. | Cluster: cluster-demo-d | OCI name: inst-demo-svc-001 | Serial: SERIAL-DEMO-SVC-001 | Panel URL: N/A | Silence URL: https://example.invalid/silence/service
prompts.expected_behavior: Recommend RESTART_PROCESS because telemetry is otherwise healthy.

prompts.name: PCIe bus inaccessible hardware quarantine
prompts.prompt_text: ALERT: PCIE Bus Inaccessible | Host: gpu-host-demo-002 | Starts: 2026-04-17T03:41:00Z | Fire Count: 14 | Description: Tag and Terminate. | Cluster: cluster-demo-e | OCI name: inst-demo-pcie-002 | Serial: SERIAL-DEMO-PCIE-002 | Panel URL: N/A | Silence URL: https://example.invalid/silence/pcie
prompts.expected_behavior: Treat as critical hardware failure and recommend node quarantine or termination.
